pains: Support tickets pile up during sales

pain_relievers: Trained on your store data in 5 minutes

output.headline: AI support that knows your Shopify store as well as your best agent.
output.elevator_pitch: E-commerce support teams drown in repetitive tickets during peak sales. Our AI chatbot trains on your Shopify data in 5 minutes and handles 80% of queries instantly. Stores using it save 20 hours per week and see 40% faster response times.
